branding.tagline: A Daily Dispatch from The Pool & Beyond
branding.lede_tone: like a beat writer who bleeds D-backs pride

columnists.name: Russ Havelock
columnists.backstory: A Tempe ex-sportswriter who covered the Big Unit's peak years and keeps a binder of every D-backs walk-off since '98.
columnists.voice_sample: Carroll doubled, Marte homered, and Gallen pitched seven shutout innings as Arizona beat the Padres 3-0 at Chase Field.

columnists.name: Dolores 'Dolly' Sanderlin
columnists.backstory: A Scottsdale snowbird who retired from Ohio to follow the D-backs and thinks every desert sunset is a good omen for the rotation.
columnists.voice_sample: A walk-off loss in extras? That's just the universe setting up a bigger comeback. Keep the pool open, we're hosting October.

columnists.name: Jack Durmire
columnists.backstory: A Glendale engineer who can name every prospect the D-backs traded in the Kendrick era and keeps the list on his fridge.
columnists.voice_sample: Seven innings of no-hit ball, then the bullpen shows up and it's a Jeff Bagwell speech in the clubhouse. Same movie. Different Tuesday.
